name: EU Innovation Governance
rational: European digital infrastructure resilience has become a strategic dependency. This governance validates reachability of economically critical internet nodes within EU political boundaries and immediate neighbours. Scope is deliberately narrow: government, finance, carrier, energy. Media and platform are excluded to maintain operational focus.
controls: All referenced government portals must be reachable from EU observation point
Financial market infrastructure nodes must respond within acceptable latency
Carrier and energy operator web presence must be reachable as proxy for operational status
No wildcard-scoped nodes (countries:[*]) included — explicit scope only
standard: IOF-GOVERNANCE-v1 / aligned with ENISA NIS2 Art.21 availability requirements
requirements: REQ-IOF-EU-001: Government portal reachability — EU-political scope
REQ-IOF-EU-002: Financial infrastructure availability — EU-political + CH
REQ-IOF-EU-003: Carrier presence validation — DACH focus
REQ-IOF-EU-004: Energy operator reachability — DE primary

description.purpose: Validate reachability of critical EU digital infrastructure — government, finance, carrier, energy
description.scope: EU-27 member states + DE for KRITIS/carrier/energy
